headline: Assessing Digital Realty (DLR) Valuation After Strong Q1 2026 Beat And Higher Dividends
summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) is back in focus after reporting fiscal Q1 2026 results that topped analyst expectations on revenue and order intake, alongside board approval of quarterly dividends on both common and preferred shares. See our latest analysis for Digital Realty Trust. At a share price of US$192.84, Digital Realty Trust has eased slightly in the very short term, with the 7 day and 30 day share price returns both down around 1%. However, the 90 day share price return of 6.56% and...
